chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-279 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case. 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 09.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nasir Malik, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General along with Javed Ahmed Channa DEO Primary and Shujaw Muhammad Phul, Executive Engineer Sukkur (Education Works)..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant petition on the ground that grievance of petitioner has been resolved. Therefore, the instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
